overall_cve.delta_vs_prior_run: April MTD moved 5174 (day 27) -> 5371 (day 28): +197 CVEs net over 24h. Extrapolation moved 5748 -> 5755 (+0.1%). Day-over-day rate (197/day) is at the running April-2026 average (~192/day) and consistent with normal Tuesday inflow (NVD typically posts ~200/day on weekdays). Week-17 (Apr 20-26) closed at 1469 (already final last run). Week-18 (Apr 27-May 03) partial through Apr-28: 218 entries (was 21 day-1 last run; backfilled 27th + 28th). Counter-argument: extrapolation will continue to tighten as remaining 2 days (Apr 29-30) resolve and NVD backfills late publications; even at 5755 April lands meaningfully below March (6304) and consistent with the Q1 churn band (4808-6304). No positive evidence of a Glasswing-driven volume shock. Conversely, NVD publication latency 4-8 weeks means Mythos disclosures from April may not appear until mid-May at earliest.

No new participant products (still 13 Glasswing companies). No new Anthropic press releases. AISLE 5-of-7 OpenSSL April CVEs remains the most recent fresh attribution data point. Public summary report from Anthropic still expected ~July 2026.

Cisco SD-WAN Manager CVEs (CVE-2026-20122/20128/20133) added to KEV 2026-04-20 are participant CVEs but already exploited (not self-scan candidates) - already documented. Apple iOS CVE-2026-28950 (notification logging issue, retained Signal notifications) does not match HTTP-parsing-adjacent criterion - skip. No new Carlini / Anthropic press releases. No new participant products in Glasswing context.

np_di_candidates.np_component: OAuth/OIDC client request handling - cache layer
np_di_candidates.rationale: Authlib is NP (auth/OIDC library at trust boundary). However CWE-352 (CSRF) is not in the widened DI set (closest neighbors are CWE-693/863 but the bug pattern is browser-state confusion, not auth-bypass-via-input-manipulation). Severity not rated. Flag for analyst awareness but not for watch-list inclusion.

projection_comparison.note: April extrapolation (5755) is +7 above the conservative anchor (5748) and identical to the aggressive anchor (5748). Both anchors converge for April since it's the 'present' point in the projection lines. May (conservative 6427 vs aggressive 7927) is where divergence begins. No Glasswing inflection visible in April actuals.

errors: Pre-existing env: tests/test_seven_year_npdi.py and tests/test_twelve_month_per_framework.py fail because their build scripts hard-code /sessions/bold-nice-euler/mnt/vulnerability\ analysis/cached-data/ paths that aren't mounted in the scheduled-task session. Same as prior run (2026-04-27). Datasets themselves were not regenerated - none of their inputs (KEV snapshot, OSV cache, manifest) changed today. All other tests (classifier 69/69, data-invariants 178/178, http-data 53/53, classifications 4773/4773, llms.txt, mythos baseline, cve-reference 46/46, epss-marginal) pass.
